-- Choose square sum theorem
theorem choose_sq_sum : ∑ k in Finset.range 9, Nat.choose 8 k ^ 2 = Nat.choose 16 8 := by {
  have h : ∑ k in Finset.range 9, Nat.choose 8 k * Nat.choose 8 (8 - k) = Nat.choose 16 8 := by {
    rw [← Finset.sum_antidiagonal_choose_mul_choose]
    rfl
  }
  convert h
  ext k
  have : k ∈ Finset.range 9 → k ≤ 8 := by {
    intro hk
    rw [Finset.mem_range] at hk
    omega
  }
  intro hk
  rw [this hk, Nat.choose_symm]
}
